name: Sidebar
description: Collapsible left navigation sidebar with role-based filtering
details: Animated sidebar with collapsed icon-only mode, expanded mode with labels and user chip, mobile overlay drawer, localStorage persistence, role-based nav filtering via useUser, and active state via react-router-dom.
instructions: Import AppSidebar and SidebarMobileHeader into your layout
Configure nav items array with paths, icons, and optional role restrictions
